channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw (17910 ⭐)

📝 Repository: zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw

item.title: 🦀 anthropics/claudes-c-compiler (2369 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: anthropics

📝 Repository: anthropics/claudes-c-compiler

📄 Descrizione: Claude Opus 4.6 wrote a dependency-free C compiler in Rust, with backends targeting x86 (64- and 32-bit), ARM, and RISC-V, capable of compiling a booting Linux kernel.

⭐ Stelle: 2369

🍴 Forks: 168

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

item.title: 🦀 sheeki03/tirith (1862 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: sheeki03

📝 Repository: sheeki03/tirith

📄 Descrizione: Your browser catches homograph attacks. Your terminal doesn't. Tirith guards the gate — intercepts suspicious URLs, ANSI injection, and pipe-to-shell attacks before they execute.

⭐ Stelle: 1862

🍴 Forks: 61

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: cli devtools homograph-attack rust security shell supply-chain-security terminal unicode url-security

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-02T04:33:47Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-23T22:12:25Z

item.title: 🦀 always-further/nono (547 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: always-further

📝 Repository: always-further/nono

📄 Descrizione: Secure, kernel-enforced sandbox CLI and SDKs for AI agents. Capability-based isolation with secure key management, atomic rollback, cryptographic immutable audit chain of provenance. Run your agents in a zero-trust environment.

⭐ Stelle: 547

🍴 Forks: 37

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agent agentic-ai ai-agent-security ai-agents ai-security code-execution cybersecurity isolation linux-security llm mcp open-source prompt-injection runtime-security sandbox security sigstore supply-chain-security zero-trust
